'''Serrata''' was the eighth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]]. It was a gas giant and had 5 moons. Serrata was a near-star, its mass falling just below the necessary level to make the transition. In the sky of [[Derilyn]], Serrata was a reddish disk as wide as the length of a man's index finger.<ref name="PotG3" />

{{Planet-stub}}
